title: Police identify woman who claimed she had been kidnapped, say she is not in danger
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Local News Abington police had initially asked for the public’s help in identifying the woman, who appeared on a Ring camera early Tuesday, saying she’d been kidnapped.
Abington police have identified a woman who told a resident she had just been kidnapped after showing up at a home early Tuesday morning, and say there is no indication she is in danger.
The woman was captured on a Ring doorbell camera around 2:53 a.

title: Bates College locks down after reported gunman, later revealed to be a false alarm
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Local News Local police said no weapon was confirmed, and the person may have been experiencing a mental health crisis.
A reported gunman in Lewiston, Maine, prompted lockdowns at Bates College, local schools, and a hospital on Thursday, though officials later said the threat was unfounded.
A shelter-in-place order was lifted after Lewiston police were unable to locate a man they initially believed was armed near campus, according to The Boston Globe.

title: This Newburyport record store just turned 50. Here’s their secret.
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Music “I have customers who’ve been coming in since the ’70s, who have literally explored a lifetime of music — their lifetime of music — right through that store.
” John Coyle, owner of Dyno Records in Newburyport, sits in the store celebrating its 50th anniversary this year.
Hussein Hammouda/Boston.

title: Red Sox’ Ranger Suarez throws 8 scoreless innings in second consecutive excellent start
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Boston Red Sox Suarez seems to be settling into his new uniform after a rough first few starts in Boston.
Ranger Suarez tossed his best start yet in his first season with the Red Sox.
AP Photo/Robert F.

title: Masa-Magic: Yoshida’s knock gives Red Sox 1-0 walk-off win over Tigers
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Boston Red Sox Alex Cora called on Yoshida to pinch hit in extra innings, and he delivered.
Masataka Yoshida walked off the Tigers in extra innings Saturday.
(Barry Chin/Globe Staff) After nine full innings of scoreless baseball, the Red Sox finally got a scoring chance in the bottom of the 10th inning.

title: Eagles reportedly to ‘operate’ 2026 NFL Draft as if A.J. Brown won’t be in Philly Week 1
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: New England Patriots The Patriots remain the "front-runner" to acquire wide receiver A.
J.
Brown from the Eagles.

title: Former Bruins captain Brad Marchand reacts to missing playoffs
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Boston Bruins Current Bruin Nikita Zadorov disagreed with Marchand’s viewpoint.
Brad Marchand expressed his “championship or bust” mindset while reflecting on the Florida Panthers' season.

Danielle Parhizkaran/Globe Staff In a somewhat unpredictable turn of events — especially for Bruins fans circa 2022 and prior — Brad Marchand will be watching the NHL playoffs from home, while the Bruins are in the postseason.

title: Fear, physicality appear to be Bruins’ key ingredients ahead of playoff showdown with Sabres
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins emphasize physical play and forechecking as key strategies for their playoff series against the Buffalo Sabres.
The Bruins lead with physicality, having seven players with over 100 hits; Tanner Jeannot and Mark Kastelic to spearhead the effort.
Boston's approach aims to wear down Buffalo's rush-heavy offense and skilled defensemen like Rasmus Dahlin and Mattias Samuelsson.
